channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Stories
channel.description: Packed Instagram-Story autolist — business, property, jobs and internships in one feed. Each item ships with a 1080×1920 story card and a 'Read more on Mutapa Times' CTA.

item.title: Econet Zimbabwe begins building 100 MW solar plant in push for energy autonomy

item.title: Liquid strengthens enterprise AI offering with Microsoft Copilot accreditation @LiquidInTech
item.description: LIQUID Intelligent Technologies Zimbabwe has secured the Microsoft Copilot Specialisation, a strategic accreditation that enhances its position in the fast-growing enterprise artificial intelligence (AI) market. The Microsoft certification is awarded to partners that demonstrate via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Tech #AfricaTech #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: PPC seeks new buyer after US$30 million Arlington land deal collapses
item.description: PPC Zimbabwe has put its 418-hectare Arlington Property back on the market after a proposed US$30 million sale to Transvaal Africa collapsed following the buyer’s failure to meet the payment deadline. In an update to shareholders, PPC said it had not received the US$30 million pu via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Zimbabwe tops Africa in medicine regulation

item.title: Cross-border bus fares spike as Zimbabweans head home
item.description: Passengers travelling from Johannesburg to Bulawayo say cross-border bus fares have increased sharply, with some claiming operators have doubled their usual prices as demand for travel to Zimbabwe rises. Several travellers said they were forced to pay between R1,000 and R1,200 fo via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Yvonne Manwa bounces back as ZIFA CEO
item.description: The Zimbabwe Football Association (ZIFA) has appointed Yvonne Manwa as its new chief executive officer (CEO), marking her return to the association six months after her previous contract expired. Manwa, the former Ngezi Platinum Stars chief executive officer, previously served ZI via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Junior Social Media Assistant — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Help grow our social channels. Pitch fresh formats and ideas. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
